page_metadata.biotools__summary: Database designed to explore 3D structures of homologous interfaces of protein complexes. Provides tools to retrieve and visualize these structures, including downloadable pre-computed multiple sequence alignments.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Database designed to explore 3D structures of homologous interfaces of protein complexes. Provides tools to retrieve and visualize these structures, including downloadable pre-computed multiple sequence alignments.
